input: A login form with email and password fields, a 'Remember me' checkbox, a primary submit button, and a 'Forgot password?' link. Center it on the page with a card around it.
A pricing page with three tiers: Hobby ($0/mo), Pro ($20/mo, marked as most popular), and Enterprise (custom pricing). Each tier should list 4-5 features with checkmark icons.

A dashboard sidebar with collapsible sections. Sections: Overview, Analytics (with sub-items: Traffic, Conversions, Revenue), Settings (with sub-items: Profile, Team, Billing), and a Sign Out button at the bottom.
A hero section for a B2B SaaS landing page. Bold headline, supporting paragraph, primary CTA button, secondary 'Watch demo' link with a play icon, and a small row of customer logos below.
A data table for displaying users. Columns: avatar, name, email, role, status (active/inactive badge), last login, and an actions menu. Include a search bar above and pagination below.

A modal dialog for confirming a destructive action like deleting an account. Should have a warning icon, a clear title, descriptive body text, a Cancel button, and a red Delete button. Make the destructive nature visually obvious.
A settings page with a vertical tab navigation on the left (Profile, Account, Notifications, Security, Billing) and the corresponding content panel on the right. Show the Profile tab as active.

A file upload component with drag-and-drop. Should show a dashed border drop zone, an upload icon, instructional text, a 'browse files' link, and a list of currently uploaded files with progress bars and remove buttons.
